events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`: the mat is rough-complete (~70%) but **fails** — bars resting directly on dirt with no chairs/bolsters means required ACI 318 cover can't be maintained, risking corrosion and settlement during pour. Corrective action is to install proper chairs/dobies at spacing per the placing drawings, verify cover/spacing, and re-inspect before any concrete placement.
